text.tspan: Complete frame unpacking into Interp state
Type mismatch or side-exit from trace
VM state restored from trace-exit point
Punishes failing traces; fallback to Interp
Compiling new traces from exit points

ul.li: V8/HotSpot: Highly complex state reconstruction (Frame rewriting) to maximize peak performance.
LuaJIT: Snapshotting allows extremely fast deoptimization but requires more memory for state snapshots.
Our JIT: Uses Side-Tables (Milestone 5) to balance implementation complexity with safe interpreter fallback.
